title: Steel And Tech Rework
description: Steel And Tech Rework is a techno-magic mod that combines industrial and magical mods. Grow with Modern Industrialization and Create (including addons), explore the world of magic with Botania and Hex Casting, upgrade your gear with TieredZ, and dive into
body: ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7d32497b40b3cf510b96c157bf03ab9150812df.jpeg)**Steel And Tech Rework** combines industrial progress and magical depth. Use **Create**, **Modern Industrialization**, and **TieredZ** for powerful automation and equipment. Discover magical systems like **Botania** and **Hex Casting**, expand storage with **Expanded Drawers** and **Iron Chests**, and reach for the stars with **Ad Astra**. Build airships with V**alkyrien Skies**, **Eureka**, and **Clockwork**. With custom world generation, dungeons, and new mobs — the world feels truly alive.
